name: ai-slop-guard
tagline: An AI code quality pipeline built around a 6-stage review sequence
description: 6-stage code quality pipeline (generate, mentally compile, lint, review, refactor, final audit) that catches common AI-agent code smells before a diff is considered done. The pipeline is the distinctive part; the rule set is what stages 3 and 6 use to do their job.
dependencies: none (Python 3.x standard library only, for both scripts/check.py and tests/)
